body:
#### PR description:

Added New Forward Shield (NFS) for Scenario 2026 in forwardshield.xml (version 2021/v2)


#### PR validation:

NFS successfully tested in the 2026 scenario. No overlaps were found (tol = 0.0).
For NSF setup image, please see PR #50333
title: Added New Forward Shield (NFS) for Scenario 2026
